headline: Cooper Companies (COO) Stock After DCF Discount And High P/E Ratio
summary: Investors may be wondering whether Cooper Companies is priced attractively today, or if the stock still looks expensive at around US$67.88 per share. The price has inched up about 0.8% over the last week and 13.9% over the last month, even though the year to date return is a decline of 16.3% and the 1 year return is a decline of 2.6%. These mixed returns sit against a longer backdrop where the stock is down 26.1% over 3 years and down 29.3% over 5 years. This may have reset expectations for...
